MINI MINUTES: All Parties sworn prior to commencement of the proceeding.

Appearances: Maria Peregrina Sanchez (Petitioner).

The Petitioner stated the Respondent has moved out on January 9, 2013 and she is withdrawing her petition. The Court allowed the withdrawal of the petition. Petition is dismissed with prejudice.
